ChatOperations_listChats.usage:
params := &ListChatsParams{
	Availability: Ptr(ChatAvailabilityIsMember),
	Limit: Ptr(int32(123)),
	Cursor: Ptr("example"),
	SortField: Ptr("example"),
	SortOrder: Ptr(SortOrderAsc),
}
response, err := client.Chats.ListChats(ctx, params)

ChatOperations_getChat.output: Chat{ID: int32, Name: string, IsChannel: bool, IsPublic: bool, CreatedAt: string, MemberIDs: *[]int32}

ChatOperations_createChat.output: Chat{ID: int32, Name: string, IsChannel: bool, IsPublic: bool, CreatedAt: string, MemberIDs: *[]int32}

ChatOperations_updateChat.output: Chat{ID: int32, Name: string, IsChannel: bool, IsPublic: bool, CreatedAt: string, MemberIDs: *[]int32}
